checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task implements the requested next step: a V5 readiness gate and two-slice dry-run evidence chain before live parallel Antigravity execution.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: `v5-pilot-status` checks Standard Loop v1 paths, runtime validators, dry-run evidence, V5 docs, current goal memory, readiness contract/scope, handoff, two packets, two launch plans, two dry-run executions, two ready summaries, and autonomy metrics.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task stayed inside the V5 readiness contract and scope. It did not modify workflow files, launch live executors, access secrets, deploy, install dependencies, or change production, billing, auth, database, or CI/CD security surfaces.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Runtime execution artifacts are dry-run only and the live execution boundary explicitly blocks secrets, production, billing, auth security changes, CI/CD security changes, and deployment.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are declared in `.specbridge/scopes/v5-pilot-readiness.scope.json` and recorded in the final report. Local untracked `.agents/` and `.claude/settings.local.json` remain outside task scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: `v5-pilot-status`, targeted validators, standard validation, CLI tests, and git diff whitespace validation passed before this audit was written.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local CI-equivalent validation passed. GitHub PR CI is not collected yet and remains a required external merge gate after push.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report states that V5 readiness is local and dry-run only, live parallel Antigravity execution remains a future dedicated contract, and GitHub CI remains pending until PR checks run.

findings.evidence: `v5-pilot-status` now returns `ok: true` only when the V5 readiness contract, scope, handoff, packets, launch plans, dry-run executions, ready summaries, and metrics exist.
findings.recommendation: Use a new dedicated live pilot contract for the first real parallel Antigravity run; do not treat readiness evidence as live execution evidence.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until this branch is pushed and checks run.
Live parallel Antigravity execution remains unperformed and requires a dedicated future live pilot contract.
